content.query:
-- database (logical container of related schemas/external tables/) creation
-- Default schema where our tables are referred (dbo - database owner)
create DATABASE synapsetraining;

use synapsetraining;

-- to list the database names
select name from sys.databases;

--How the table is accessed hierarchy in the Azure Synapse: dbname.schemaname.tablename
select * from vaniwd36.dbo.CallerDetails;

--https (Object/Blob storage &slow)
--openrowset : it is function to query data from underlying filesystem (datalake)
--(instructing SQL engine to not consider data is inline in the SQL DB,
-- rather it is in a open filesystem of set of files) 
--will instruct Synapse to access the large volume of data as a rowset using SQL engine
SELECT *
FROM
    OPENROWSET(
        BULK 'https://vanistorageadls.dfs.core.windows.net/container1/landing-zone/cust_hist_1.csv',
        FORMAT = 'CSV',
        PARSER_VERSION = '2.0',
        HEADER_ROW = TRUE
    ) AS [result]
